thi12:1.0.236: “I used to be a water-carrier. Even when it was cold,I would always plunge into the water,afraid of my mistresses’ beatings,harassed by fear of abuse and anger.
thi12:1.0.237: Brahmin, what are you afraid of,that you always plunge into the water,your limbs tremblingin the freezing cold?”
thi12:1.0.238: “Oh, but you already know,Madam Puṇṇikā, when you ask me:I am doing good deeds,to ward off the wickedness I have done.
thi12:1.0.239: Whosoever young or oldperforms a wicked deed,by ablution in water they arereleased from their wicked deed.”
thi12:1.0.240: “Who on earth told you this,one ignoramus to another:‘Actually, by ablution in water one isreleased from a wicked deed.’
thi12:1.0.241: Would not they all go to heaven, then:all the frogs and the turtles,gharials, crocodiles,and other water-dwellers too?
thi12:1.0.242: Butchers of sheep and pigs,fishermen, animal trappers,bandits, executioners,and others of evil deeds:by ablution in water they too would bereleased from their wicked deeds.
thi12:1.0.243: If these rivers washed awaythe bad deeds of the past,then they’d also wash off goodness,and thereby you would be excluded.
thi12:1.0.244: Brahmin, the thing that you are afraid of,when you always plunge into the water,do not do that very thing,don’t let the cold harm your skin.”
thi12:1.0.245: “I have been on the wrong path,and you’ve guided me to the noble path.Madam, I give to youthis ablution cloth.”
thi12:1.0.246: “Keep the cloth for yourself,I do not want it.If you fear suffering,if you don’t like suffering,
thi12:1.0.247: then don’t do bad deedseither openly or in secret.If you should do a bad deed,or you’re doing one now,
thi12:1.0.248: you won’t be freed from suffering,though you fly away and flee.If you fear suffering,if you don’t like suffering,
thi12:1.0.249: go for refuge to the Buddha, the poised,to his teaching and to the Saṅgha.Undertake the precepts,that will be good for you.”
thi12:1.0.250: “I go for refuge to the Buddha, the poised,to his teaching and to the Saṅgha.I undertake the precepts,that will be good for me.
thi12:1.0.251: In the past I was related to Brahmā,today I truly am a brahmin!I am master of the three knowledges, accomplished in wisdom,I’m a scholar and a bathed initiate.”
